hero.title: Property in Riyadh, selected with care.
hero.subtitle: FindRE is a boutique real estate studio focused on Northern Riyadh. Discover premium residences, direct from people who know the neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Why FindRE
valueProps.subtitle: Three simple promises that shape every listing we share.

expertise.title: Local expertise
expertise.body: Deep knowledge of Al Arid, Al Yasmin, Al Narjis, An Nafal and the districts that define Northern Riyadh.

curated.title: Curated, not crowded
curated.body: Every property is vetted in person. No stale listings, no surprises on the visit.

direct.title: Direct human contact
direct.body: Reach us on WhatsApp and speak with a real advisor — not a funnel, not a bot.

featured.title: Featured properties
featured.subtitle: A small selection of what's on the market right now.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: A direct path from browsing to move-in.

browse.title: Browse
browse.body: Scan our curated list and find properties that match your brief.

check.title: Check availability
check.body: Each listing shows a clear, up-to-date availability status.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: Reach out on WhatsApp or send a request — we respond quickly.

aboutStrip.title: A new standard for Riyadh real estate.
aboutStrip.body: We built FindRE for buyers and tenants who expect clarity, speed, and a human voice at the other end of the conversation.

ctaSection.title: Found something you like?
ctaSection.body: Start a WhatsApp conversation with our team — or send an inquiry and we'll reply the same day.

empty.title: No properties match these filters.
empty.body: Try resetting filters or contact us directly — we may have off-market options.

property.inquireBody: Start a WhatsApp chat with our team — pre-filled with this listing.

hero.title: Real estate, delivered with clarity.
hero.body: FindRE is a Riyadh-based real estate studio. We work with a small, carefully chosen set of properties, and we handle every inquiry ourselves.

story.title: Our story
story.body: We started FindRE because finding a home in Riyadh shouldn't feel like chasing phantom listings. Our team brings years of neighborhood-level experience to every client we serve.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Give every client a calm, honest path to the right property.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: The most trusted boutique real estate name in Northern Riyadh.

values.title: Values
values.body: Clarity, discretion, and genuine local knowledge.

rooted.title: Rooted in Northern Riyadh
rooted.body: We know these streets, buildings, and neighborhoods in person.

transparent.title: Transparent listings
transparent.body: Real status, real photos, real prices — always.

human.title: Direct human contact
human.body: A real advisor answers every WhatsApp message.

hero.title: We're one message away.
hero.body: Reach us on WhatsApp for the fastest response, or send a detailed request below.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.

info.whatsappBody: Fastest response. Typically within the hour during business days.

footer.tagline: Boutique real estate in Northern Riyadh.
